## Summary

- 

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests/tooling

## Compatibility

- [ ] PrestaShop 8.0 compatibility considered
- [ ] PrestaShop 8.1/8.2 compatibility considered
- [ ] PrestaShop 9.x compatibility considered where relevant
- [ ] PHP 7.4+ compatibility preserved

## Safety checklist

- [ ] No core overrides added
- [ ] No SaaS dependency, telemetry, or external paid service dependency added
- [ ] No automatic refund, order cancellation, payment-state change, or return-label behavior added by default
- [ ] No personal data, credentials, or tokens committed
- [ ] Merchant-facing legal/compliance wording was not changed, or the change is clearly documented for legal review

## Testing

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Manual PrestaShop test performed
- [ ] Not tested, with reason:
